Author: goat, Maple, DukePantarei
Name: Ultrawide Cutscenes
Punchline: Remove letterboxing from cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.
Description:
Removes the letterboxing bars displayed during cutscenes on ultrawide monitors.

Note: You may occasionally see NPCs popping in or T-posing at screen edges. This is expected. (Also a Pathetic attempt to have this working outside the official Dalamud Repo because of the lack of updates.)
